# Cozy Halloween Books

URL: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com

Cozy Halloween Books is a curated site for Halloween coloring books for kids, teens, and adults. The site focuses on cozy spooky themes, cute Halloween artwork, seasonal gifts, relaxing coloring activities, and easy-to-browse book recommendations.

Curator and author brand: Ella Tarling

## Main Sections

- Homepage: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com
- Categories: themed collections of Halloween coloring books
- Book detail pages: individual book pages with title, cover image, ASIN reference, Amazon link, editorial notes, best-for sections, and related books

## Important Categories

- Cute Halloween Coloring Books: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com/categories/cute-halloween
- Cozy Spooky Coloring Books: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com/categories/cozy-spooky
- Ghost Coloring Books: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com/categories/ghost-coloring-books
- Bold & Easy Coloring Books: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com/categories/bold-easy

## Page Structure

Book detail pages include:

- Book title
- Book cover image
- ASIN reference for transparency
- Link to Amazon
- Editorial note
- Best-for recommendations
- Popular themes
- Gift use cases
- Related books

Category pages group books by theme and include short descriptions, best-for context, and links to matching book detail pages.

## Discovery Links

- Sitemap: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.cozyhalloweenbooks.com/robots.txt
